name: project_file_write
description: Write/create a file inside a project's code directory. Use this to save code to your assigned projects.
description_for_agent: Write or create a file inside a project's code directory. Parameters: project_slug (string, e.g. 'hello-world'), path (string, relative path inside project code dir, e.g. 'main.py' or 'src/utils.py'), content (string, file content). Creates parent directories automatically. ALWAYS use this skill to save code to projects instead of file_write.

path.description: Relative file path inside project code dir
